title: christella normalis
intro: Christella normalis, also known as the common forked thyme or Christella, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that is widely distributed in various parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Christella normalis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. Christella normalis can be consumed as a tea, or used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures, and is believed to offer health benefits including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting overall well-being.
